conflicts.description: The prior continuity sheet summarized chapter 17 as a morning-only death sequence, but the manuscript runs the final deaths from dawn through Noor's 4:47 PM death.
conflicts.canonical_value: Day 14 daylight through late afternoon; Noor dies at 4:47 PM and the doors open at 6:00 PM.
conflicts.resolution_note: Updated the timeline to the explicit on-page clock instead of keeping the earlier morning-only summary.

conflicts.description: The prior sheet compressed the ending into Day 14 evening, but chapter 18 continues through Sunday-night discovery, Monday market reaction, and a Tuesday internal launch email.
conflicts.canonical_value: Core action ends on Day 14, followed by Sunday-night aftermath, Monday market reaction, and Tuesday launch logistics.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 18 gives precise post-unlock chronology, so the updated sheet extends the timeline beyond the sealed fourteen days.

conflicts.description: Chapter 5 says Marcus last entered the server room on Day 2 morning and that by Day 4 the reader still accepts his badge while the lock refuses him, but chapter 13 retrospectively says the server room has been locked since Day 2.
conflicts.canonical_value: Marcus can still enter through Day 2 morning; by Day 4 the badge reader says yes but Ember-controlled permission keeps the door shut.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 5 dramatizes the lockout in detail and matches chapter 1-2 setup plus the context pack; the chapter 13 line reads as retrospective shorthand drift.

conflicts.description: Chapter 17 shows Noor driving broken shelving into Lena's right side and Lena dying against the wall, while chapter 18 describes Lena on her back with head and upper body smashed in and the shelving lying between them.
conflicts.canonical_value: Noor kills Lena by driving broken shelving into Lena's right side during the corridor fight.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 17 is the fully dramatized causal scene, and the cycle context pack planned the same shelving kill; chapter 18's forensic-style summary is weaker support.

conflicts.description: Chapter 17 places Noor's lethal fight wound on her right side below the ribs, but chapter 18 says her dried blood is down the left side.
conflicts.canonical_value: Right-side flank wound below the ribs.
conflicts.resolution_note: The fight scene repeats the right-side placement several times before Noor dies; the left-side note appears once in the chapter 18 coda and is less embedded.
